title: Asset Entry
description: A media asset associated with a character card, such as an icon, background image, or emotion sprite.

type.title: Asset Type
type.description: The type of asset. Standard types are 'icon', 'background', 'emotion', and 'user_icon'. Custom types must use the 'x_' prefix.

uri.title: URI
uri.description: URI pointing to the asset data. May be a data URI, a relative path within the card archive, or an external URL.

ext.title: File Extension
ext.description: File extension indicating the asset format (e.g., 'png', 'jpg', 'webp').

size.title: File Size
size.description: Size of the asset in bytes.

hash.title: Hash
hash.description: Hash of the asset data for integrity verification.

label.title: Label
label.description: Display label for this asset, used for UI presentation.
